en: I wanted to share this little story with you.
ko: 이 작은 이야기를 여러분과 나누고 싶었어요.

en: I got into a little bit of trouble with the French government.
ko: 저는 프랑스 정부와 조금 문제가 생겼어요.

en: So what happened was, let's start at the beginning.
ko: 그래서 무슨 일이 있었냐면, 처음부터 시작해볼게요.

en: And so on the show, we celebrated that
and I had this joke where I said, Africa won the World Cup.
And I was shocked at how angry a lot of French people got.
ko: 많은 프랑스 사람들이 얼마나 화가 났는지 정말 놀랐어요.

en: Like genuine, a lot of French people were angry and they were like, oh, Trevor, how can you say this?
ko: 그들은 "트레버, 어떻게 그런 말을 할 수 있어?"라고 했어요.

en: Why would you say these things? And you know, this is horrible. And I was like, okay, I get it.
ko: 이건 끔찍해. 그리고 나는, 알겠어, 이해했어.

en: Like, not everyone likes every joke that you tell. And I get that, but this was interesting.
ko: 모든 사람이 당신이 하는 농담을 좋아하는 건 아니니까요.

en: I got a letter from the ambassador. The ambassador of France.
